case_title: CALVIN BOSWELL VS. WYETH, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOT REPORTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-11-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE CASE IS COORDINATED WITH REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES, JCCP 4631. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 303.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSWELL, CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH, INC.
